Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,314Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

entry.title: The Standard You Set
entry.summary:
Author: whimsybuckley

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,364Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 0

Summary: “Let me take you out,” Eddie interrupts him mid-sentence. “On a date.” He clarifies it so easily, so simply, that Buck's heart actually comes to a stop. “Wh–what?” Buck asks. He’s searching. He’s looking for any sign on Eddie's face that this is a joke, that he's being made fun of, or that it’s some kind of 'best friend' prank. But Eddie’s face is just... serious. His eyes are warm and gentle and earnest and—Eddie just asked him out on a date. “You go on all these dates, Buck. With all these people and... and none of them treat you right. I mean, that guy gave you a black eye!” Eddie’s voice hitches, and he starts to ramble, his hands moving restlessly. “Just—let me show you. Let me show you how you deserve to be treated.” ˚.⋆✶⋆.˚ or The 5+1 fic where Buck’s dates are total disasters, and Eddie stops listening and starts showing him how it's done.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Lost and Found-The TRUE story about Evan Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: Bellaromanza

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,087Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 163

entry.title: I’m In Love With A Boy I Know
entry.summary:
Author: Cosybookworm

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,088Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie turned then. Their eyes met. And Buck.... Buck forgot how to breathe for a second. Now Buck did in fact believe in curses, jinxes and signs from the universe. He believed stories were written in stars. He believed that someone's destiny could be pre-written before they even existed. So as Buck lost himself drowning in Eddie Diaz's chocolate brown eyes of warmth, he believed that this ethereal being had been created to meet Buck. And maybe Buck had been created to be a part of this man's life.   Or - Buck and Eddie both had trauma when it comes to love and yet they find themselves falling into a relationship without even realising it. Or maybe they do and they just don’t care.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Weightless
entry.summary:
Author: bandhoez9194

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,303Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: It all almost spilled out when Buck's hands wrapped around his waist and just lifted him so effortlessly. The flex of Buck's muscles under the cut-off t-shirt he was wearing, the warmth of his palms against Eddie's skin since he was in an old t-shirt it rode up easily. The fact that Buck could so easily move him around without issues. It almost had Eddie blurting out 'holy fuck I'm so gay' and 'pin me down and do whatever you want to me'. ~~~~~~~~~ Buck keeps manhandling Eddie doing the most mundane things. Eddies kinda losing his mind over it Prompt from @/buddiebite on Twitter ^_^

entry.title: I Just Met You, I've Known You Forever
entry.summary:
Author: j_marie_archie50

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,437Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: “Well,” Maddie started, “Eddie, that is my brother, Buck. This is a very on-brand first impression for him.”Grinning, Eddie turned back to Buck and held his hand out. “Nice to meet you, Buck. I’m Eddie.”Buck grasped his hand and squeezed it.Wow. His hands were big. Eddie felt his face turn hot.“Pleasure is all mine, Eddie.” Buck smiled at him and continued to hold his hand for longer than necessary.Eddie didn’t mind. OR: Buck first meets Eddie at Maddie and Chimney's dinner party. It goes about as well as expected.

entry.title: shiny and new
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,701Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 74

Summary: “Yeah,” Eddie breathes out, nodding. “Yeah. I’ll be your first.”“We don’t have to,” Buck rushes out, eyes half-lidded. “I just—”“Please,” Eddie says urgently, cutting Buck off. “I want to.”Buck seems to catch on, then, a grin spreading across his face as he ruts against Eddie’s hand. “Ye– Yeah? You wanna pop my cherry, Eddie?”OR: Buck and Eddie lose their virginities together. Kind of.

entry.title: All Love Must Leave (Oh, But Search For It, I Will)
entry.summary:
Author: bakuswaist

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,334Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

Summary: Buck is spiraling. And when Buck spirals…He leans forward fast, meeting Eddie in the middle and kissing him before he can think enough to convince himself not to. He pulls back just as quick, not even giving himself the chance to catalogue the feeling of Eddie’s lips on his own. Opening his eyes, he spares a look at the other man, and finds nothing but shock.… He makes things worse.“Fuck, Eddie I — I’m sorry. I — I’m gonna go.”---Or: Buck has a difficult conversation with Theo, spirals out about it, then makes things worse. Title from Staying Still by Noah Kahan

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 833,714Chapters: 85/?Kudos: 124

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 605,736Chapters: 78/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

entry.title: Don't Leave Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: itsbooelle

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,400Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 28

Summary: After Bobby's death, everyone is struggling. On a rainy shift, with everyone in their own particular bad moods, it seems to come to a head. When the road is washed out from under them, each member of the 118 has to face their own misgivings and misconceptions before they run out of time.

entry.title: The Family We Choose
entry.summary:
Author: Deathorcake

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,276Chapters: 2/8Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck is struggling to adjust to life at the 118 without Eddie, especially when he finds out who his replacement is going to be. But what's really bothering him is the fact that his best friend of 7 years is ghosting him.Meanwhile, Eddie has carved out a new life for himself in the Big Apple. He has a steady job and a beautiful girlfriend. On the surface Eddie appears to have the perfect life. But is it too perfect?Once he starts to pick away at the veneer, what he finds there sets him off on an epic journey into his past.Back in LA Athena teams up with an unlikely ally to get Eddie back where he belongs.

entry.title: AL's Angel
entry.summary:
Author: Lounananana

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,627Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 81

Summary: Albert is back in L.A., and he’s just met an absolute angel of a firefighter—cute, gorgeous, kind, and hot. “An angel from the 105?” Chimney says. “Let me ask probie—he just pulled a shift over there.”  Meanwhile, Ravi can’t seem to shake a certain flirtatious playboy. No matter where he goes, it’s like the guy is haunting him.All he knows is that the guy's name is AL.

entry.title: Built Around You
entry.summary:
Author: jve118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 835Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Buck finally has someone who needs him first, and for the first time in years, Eddie realizes what it feels like when Buck doesn’t automatically come home to them. As Theo settles into Buck’s life, the quiet distance growing between the Diaz apartment and Buck’s house begins exposing feelings neither of them were ready to name.

entry.title: I'm tired of bein' lonely (So I sleep with someone else)
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,200Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: After their breakup, Buck tries to fill the empty space Eddie left behind with other people, but no matter who he wakes up beside, it never feels right. Across the city, Eddie is doing the exact same thing—pretending he’s moved on while still orbiting Buck in every quiet moment. But when a dangerous call forces the truth out into the open, both of them have to face the one thing they’ve been avoiding: No one else will ever compare. ------ Inspired by a song by Only The Poets called Guess She’s Cool
